description: Combined taint and state: userPath param flows to fs.openSync, and fd leaks on early return when bytesRead is 0. Safe version uses try/finally.

expected.notes: userPath flows to fs.openSync but fs.openSync is not a recognized taint sink and userPath is a param not a recognized source
TP: fs.openSync fd at line 4 may leak on early return at line 9 when bytesRead is 0 (per-function scoped: some paths close, some don't)
processUserFileSafe uses try/finally — state-resource-leak must NOT fire (regression guard for TS finally tracking)
fs.openSync closed via try/finally — cfg-resource-leak must NOT fire (regression guard)
